overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Odyssey showing a character walking along a coastal hillside trail during golden hour. The character traverses dirt paths and a wooden bridge, passing by a roadside vendor stall with NPCs in a Mediterranean landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal hillside trail with sea view

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path with the sea visible to the right and rocky hillside to the left

entered.detail: steep rocky cliff face covered with patches of grass
winding dirt trail with scattered stones
open view of the sea with distant islands on the horizon
olive trees with gnarled trunks and green foliage
tall weathered boulders beside the path
abandoned wooden cart with broken wheels beside the path

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a coastal hillside trail during golden hour. The dirt path winds between a rocky cliff face on the left and open sea views on the right, dotted with olive trees and large boulders. An abandoned wooden cart sits beside the path as the character approaches a wooden bridge.

events.description: ground surface transitions from dirt trail to wooden bridge planks

agents.ego_description: crossing the wooden bridge over a small rocky ravine

entered.detail: weathered wooden plank bridge with gaps between boards
low stone walls lining the sides of the bridge

segments.scene_description: The character steps onto a weathered wooden bridge that crosses a small ravine. The planks are worn with gaps between them, and low stone railings line the sides. The surrounding trees create partial shade as the character crosses to the other side.

events.description: roadside vendor stall with hanging goods comes into view on the right

agents.ego_description: walking along the trail and passing a roadside vendor stall with NPCs

notable_agents.action: vendor standing behind the wooden stall arranging goods
pedestrian walking toward the camera along the dirt path

entered.detail: dirt trail continuing through grassy terrain
wooden market stall with fabric canopy and hanging produce
large sunlit boulders on the hillside

segments.scene_description: After crossing the bridge, the character returns to the dirt trail and approaches a roadside vendor stall shaded by a tree. The stall displays hanging goods and a vendor tends to it while another pedestrian walks toward the camera. The path continues through grassy hills dotted with rocks and olive trees.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a coastal hillside trail that transitions from a rugged cliffside path to a bustling roadside stop. It begins with the character walking a winding dirt path between a rocky cliff face and open sea views, passing an abandoned wooden cart and olive trees under the glow of golden hour. As the trail narrows, the camera follows the character onto a weathered wooden bridge with worn planks and low stone railings that crosses a shaded ravine. The scene then opens back onto the dirt trail, shifting from the seclusion of the bridge toward a roadside vendor stall shaded by a tree where NPCs gather. Finally, the path extends forward through grassy hills dotted with rocks and olive trees as the character continues their journey.
